citation.description: inbound_probe.py contains only ProbeBranch, ProbeResult, ProbeConfigError — no adapters.jira import, no URL, no auth, no status-name classification. The AST gate covering 'inbound_probe.py' is at test_backend_neutrality.py:152-154 (in _ZERO_ADAPTER_IMPORT_SCALAR_CORE). Jira mechanics are in adapters/jira/probe.py.

criteria.criterion: `inbound_probe.py` contains NO `adapters.jira` import and no vendor REST code (URL shape, auth, status-name classification all live under `adapters/jira/probe.py`) — verified by the extended AST case in `tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_neutrality.py` plus code review.

citation.description: _run_differs_inbound_probe_dispatch uses isinstance(backend, SupportsAbsenceProbe) guard. Without the capability, it produces ProbeResult(ProbeBranch.UNREACHABLE, ...). Tested by test_probe_capability_heldout.py:test_dispatch_degrades_to_unreachable_without_capability and test_probe_capability.py:test_dispatch_uses_backend_probe_when_capable.

criteria.criterion: `run_differs` reaches the probe only through `SupportsAbsenceProbe`; a capability-lacking backend degrades to UNREACHABLE — verified by the routing tests in Testing.

citation.description: test_classifies_archived_or_moved (404/410/403), test_classifies_unreachable (500/502/503/401), test_classifies_present_resolved and test_classifies_present_filtered in test_probe_capability.py cover all 4 branches against adapters/jira/probe.py. Old test_inbound_probe.py is absent (confirmed by search). The GET-only invariant and missing-env ProbeConfigError are also tested.

criteria.criterion: Probe classification behavior is byte-identical for Jira (all branches) — verified by the migrated probe tests.
